warnings: This is a routing/layout plan; exact outlet count per room is not being asserted precisely due to symbol density and resolution limits.
This sheet (EE-04) also contains a right-hand notes block (telephone/TV wiring notes + an air-conditioner circuit sizing table), captured separately in the sibling file.
